generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that cutting defense budgets by even 5% could leave our cities vulnerable to emerging threats? As someone who values safety and stability, it's crucial we maintain strong deterrence. Our allies are counting on us, and we can't afford to gamble with national security. #StrongerDefense #NationalSecurityFirst
